test.name: Validar botão de retornar aos produtos

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clicar no botao de abrir carrinho
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Validar acesso na pagina de produtos
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Validar remoção de item do carrinho

Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Keyword 'Element Text Should Be' found both from a custom library 'SeleniumLibrary' and a standard library 'XML'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'SeleniumLibrary.Element Text Should Be' or 'XML.Element Text Should Be'.
Verifying element 'id=add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack' contains exact text 'Add to cart'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Keyword 'Element Text Should Be' found both from a custom library 'SeleniumLibrary' and a standard library 'XML'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'SeleniumLibrary.Element Text Should Be' or 'XML.Element Text Should Be'.
Verifying element 'css:[data-test='error']' contains exact text 'Error: First Name is required'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element '//*[@id="login_button_container"]/div/form/div[3]/h3' contains text 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service'.
kw.arg: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element '//*[@id="login_button_container"]/div/form/div[3]/h3' contains text 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'.
kw.arg: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Validar visibilidade dos produtos na interface

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Keyword 'Element Text Should Be' found both from a custom library 'SeleniumLibrary' and a standard library 'XML'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'SeleniumLibrary.Element Text Should Be' or 'XML.Element Text Should Be'.
Verifying element 'id=add-to-cart-sauce-labs-onesie' contains exact text 'Add to cart'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Keyword 'Element Text Should Be' found both from a custom library 'SeleniumLibrary' and a standard library 'XML'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'SeleniumLibrary.Element Text Should Be' or 'XML.Element Text Should Be'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.name: Clicar botao remover produto do carrinho

kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Validar quantidade de produtos no carrinho

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Element Text Should Be' found both from a custom library 'SeleniumLibrary' and a standard library 'XML'. The custom keyword is used. To select explicitly, and to get rid of this warning, use either 'SeleniumLibrary.Element Text Should Be' or 'XML.Element Text Should Be'.
